data.name: 女裝偵探葉語嫣2
data.detailed_description:
擁有絕色容顏的偽娘偵探葉語嫣，竟是一名解決犯罪案件的專家！



動作潛入遊戲「女裝偵探葉語嫣」
在遊戲中你將扮演主角葉語嫣，一名具有出色外貌的男扮女裝探案專家。她以自己獨特的技能，潛入犯罪組織的據點，解救失踪的少女，並持續追尋失踪的姐姐。

遊戲中有各種類型的任務，包括調查任務、解救任務和清除任務等，每一個都將考驗你的智慧和勇氣。

葉語嫣將經歷怎樣的神秘事件？她將會面臨怎樣的危險罪犯？


在「女裝偵探葉語嫣」中，你將置身於犯罪橫行的都市，與各種罪犯和惡徒展開智力競爭。你需要收集證據、分析信息，並從各個角度來追求真相。

尋找美麗的姐姐，解救失踪的少女！


主人公葉語嫣的主線任務是找到失踪的姐姐。她可能被綁架，也可能在執行危險任務。
要收集信息，玩家需要操作手機找到各種委托任務。

data.short_description: 擁有絕色容顏的偽娘偵探葉語嫣，竟是一名解決犯罪案件的專家！ 在遊戲中你將扮演主角葉語嫣，一名具有出色外貌的男裝女裝探案專家。她以自己獨特的技能，潛入犯罪組織的據點，解救失踪的少女，並持續追尋失踪的姐姐。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: intel i3-2100 / AMD A8-5600ki
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX630 / Radeon HD 6570
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: CrossdresserDetective2
data.detailed_description:
The stunningly handsome, Crossdressing Detective Ye Yuyan is actually an expert in solving crime cases!



Welcome to this action infiltration game, where you'll play as the protagonist Ye Yuyan, an expert detective with an impressive appearance, skilled in both male and female disguises. Utilize her unique abilities to infiltrate the strongholds of criminal organizations, rescue missing girls, and continue the search for her missing sister.

The game features various types of missions, including investigation tasks, rescue missions, and elimination missions, each testing your wit and courage.

What mysterious events will Ye Yuyan experience? What dangerous criminals will she encounter?


In "Crossdressing Detective Ye Yuyan," you'll immerse yourself in a city rampant with crime, engaging in intellectual battles with various criminals and villains. You'll need to gather evidence, analyze information, and pursue the truth from every angle.

Find the beautiful sister, rescue the missing girls!


The main task of the protagonist Ye Yuyan is to find her missing sister. She may have been abducted or could be on a dangerous mission.

To gather information, players need to operate their phones to find various mission requests.

  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
